spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Aida is a 7th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 13}, {@hit 5} to hit with spell attacks). She has the following druid spells prepared:

trait.name: Evasive
entries: Aida adds her Intelligence modifier as a bonus to Dexterity saving throws (already included in the stat block).

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 5ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d6 + 1}) piercing damage.

action.name: Quarterstaff
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 2} to hit ({@hit 4} to hit with {@spell shillelagh}), reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d6}) bludgeoning damage, 4 ({@damage 1d8}) bludgeoning damage if wielded with two hands, or 6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) bludgeoning damage with {@spell shillelagh}.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The amphithere can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Fleet of Fin
entries: The amphithere can take the {@action Dash} or {@action Disengage} action as a bonus action.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The amphithere makes two attacks, one with its bite and one with its tail.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) poison damage, and if the target is a creature, it must succeed on a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw or become {@condition poisoned} for 1 hour.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Poison Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: The amphithere exhales a blast of stinging venom in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw, taking 17 ({@damage 5d6}) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature reduced to 0 hit points by this attack remains stable but is {@condition poisoned} for 1 hour, even after regaining hit points. If a creature has total cover from the amphithere, it is not affected by the breath attack.

trait.name: Shapechanger
entries: The animated slime can use its action to polymorph into an object or back into its true, amorphous form. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

trait.name: False Appearance (Object Form Only)
entries: While the animated slime remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary object.

trait.name: Grappler
entries: The animated slime has advantage on attack rolls against any creature {@condition grappled} by it.

trait.name: Occasionally Adhesive (Object Form Only)
entries: The animated slime can use a bonus action to become sticky and adhere to anything that touches it. A Huge or smaller creature adhered to the animated slime is also {@condition grappled} by it (escape {@dc 13}). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have disadvantage. The animated slime can become non-adhesive at any time.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) acid damage.

action.name: Pseudopod
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) bludgeoning damage. If the slime is in object form, the target is subjected to its Occasionally Adhesive trait (if it is currently active).

monster.name: Arlowene Lum
languages: can speak with beasts of any size which represent spiders, insects, worms, or other bugs

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Arlowene is a 10th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 13}, {@hit 5} to hit with spell attacks). Arlowene has the following spells prepared:

action.name: Staff
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 1} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}2 ({@damage 1d6 - 1}) bludgeoning damage, or 3 ({@damage 1d8 - 1}) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands.

action.name: Curl Up
entries: Arlowene curls up into a spiny ball. When curled up in this way, she can't move, attack, or cast spells with somatic components, and her base armor class becomes 19. Any creature that misses Arlowene with an attack while she is curled up takes 5 {@dice 2d4} points of piercing damage from her sharp quills. If a creature hits Arlowene while she is curled up, however, Arlowene is knocked {@condition prone} in her space. Arlowene may uncurl herself at any point during her turn.

monster.name: Arrevis Fleet
languages: understands Auran but can't speak it

trait.name: Special Equipment
entries: Arrevis wields a gold-hilted {@item Longsword of Life Stealing||longsword of life-stealing}. Attacks made with this weapon are magical. Arrevis also wears a {@item periapt of wound closure}.

trait.name: Pain Threshold
entries: If Arrevis takes 20 damage or more at once, he is {@condition stunned} until the end of his next turn.

trait.name: Glide
entries: When falling at least 10 feet, Arrevis can spend a reaction to fly up to his speed in one direction as he descends. Arrevis lands in an unoccupied space at the end of his movement and takes no falling damage. Arrevis cannot glide while carrying heavy objects, heavy weapons, or shields (though he can drop any held items as part of his reaction).

trait.name: Talons
entries: Arrevis has advantage on Strength ({@skill Athletics}) checks made to climb any surface his talons could reasonably grip.

trait.name: Patient
entries: When Arrevis reacts with a {@action Ready||readied action}, he has advantage on the first attack roll, skill check, or ability check he makes as part of that action.

trait.name: Woodland Hunter
entries: Arrevis treats three-quarters cover as half cover and half cover as no cover.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Arrevis makes two attacks with his longsword of life stealing. If Arrevis leaves one hand free, he can also make an attack with his talons.

action.name: Longsword of Life Stealing
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) slashing damage, or 8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) slashing damage if used with two hands. Whenever Arrevis scores a critical hit with this attack, his target takes an extra 10 ({@damage 3d6}) necrotic damage, provided that the target isn't a construct or an undead. Arrevis gains temporary hit points equal to the extra damage dealt.

action.name: Talons
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 4} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) piercing damage. The longbow is not considered a {@itemProperty H||heavy} weapon for Arrevis.

monster.name: Aster the Thorn
languages: can speak with beasts of any size which represent spiders, insects, worms, or bugs

trait.name: Bandit Fighting
entries: When Aster hits with a melee attack, he can spend a bonus action to either take the {@action Disengage} action or attempt to trip the target of his attack. A creature he attempts to trip must succeed on a {@dc 13} Strength saving throw or be knocked {@condition prone}.

trait.name: Bandit Flight
entries: Whenever Aster takes the {@action Dash} or {@action Disengage} actions in combat, difficult terrain doesn't cost him extra movement that turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Aster makes two melee attacks with his barbed longsword. If using his longsword with one hand, he can also make an attack with either his shortsword or hand crossbow.

action.name: Barbed Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) slashing damage, or 8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) slashing damage if used with two hands. When Aster scores a critical hit with this weapon, his attack deals an extra 7 piercing damage.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Hand Crossbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 5} to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Curl Up
entries: Aster curls up into a spiny ball. While curled up in this way, he cannot move, attack, or cast spells with somatic components, and his base armor class becomes 19. Any creature that misses Aster with a melee attack while he is curled up takes {@dice 2d4} points of piercing damage from his sharp quills. If a creature hits Aster while he is curled up, however, Aster is knocked {@condition prone} in his space at the end of the turn. Aster may uncurl himself at any point during his turn.

monster.name: Bernice Blatherwick
languages: understands Auran but can't speak it

trait.name: Glide
entries: When falling at least 10 feet, Bernice can spend a reaction to fly up to her speed in one direction as she descends. She lands in an unoccupied space at the end of her movement and takes no falling damage. She cannot glide while carrying heavy objects or heavy weapons (though she can drop any held items as part of her reaction).

trait.name: Wing Flap
entries: As a bonus action, Bernice can use her powerful feathered arms to propel herself upward up to half her movement speed. Bernice can use this in conjunction with a regular jump, but not while gliding.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d8 + 1}) slashing damage or 6 ({@damage 1d10 + 1}) slashing damage if used with two hands.

action.name: Inspire
entries: Bernice inspires an ally that can see and hear her. The ally can roll a {@dice 1d4} and add the number rolled to its next ability check, attack roll, or saving throw.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: Bernice adds 2 to her AC against one melee attack that would hit her. To do so, Bernice must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.

trait.name: Standing Leap
entries: Bervis's base long jump is 30 feet, and his base high jump is 15 feet with or without a running start.

trait.name: Team Tactics
entries: Bervis can take the {@action Help} action as a bonus action.

action.name: Shortened Spear
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 2} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}2 ({@damage 1d4}) piercing damage, or 3 ({@damage 1d6}) piercing damage if used with two hands.

monster.name: Birdfolk Thug
languages: understands Auran but can't speak it

trait.name: Glide
entries: When falling at least 10 feet, the thug can spend a reaction to fly up to its speed in one direction as it descends. It lands in an unoccupied space at the end of its movement, and takes no falling damage. The thug can't glide while carrying heavy objects, heavy weapons, or shields (though it can drop any held items as part of its reaction).

trait.name: Bandit Fighting
entries: When the thug hits with a melee weapon attack, it can spend a bonus action to either take the {@action Disengage} action or attempt to trip the target of its attack. A creature it attempts to trip must succeed on a {@dc 12} Strength saving throw or be knocked {@condition prone}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The thug makes two melee attacks.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 feet, one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d2 + 2}) piercing damage.

action.name: Heavy Crossbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 4} to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d10 + 2}) piercing damage.

monster.name: Bullybird
languages: understands Auran but can't speak it

trait.name: Glide
entries: When falling at least 10 feet, Bullybird can spend a reaction to fly up to his speed in one direction as he descends. He lands in an unoccupied space at the end of his movement, and takes no falling damage. Bullybird can't glide while carrying heavy objects, heavy weapons, or shields (though he can drop any held items as part of his reaction).

trait.name: Wing Flap
entries: As a bonus action, Bullybird can use his powerful feathered arms to propel himself 15 feet upward. Bullybird can't use this ability while gliding.

trait.name: Brute
entries: A melee weapon deals one extra die of its damage when Bullybird hits with it (included in the attack).

trait.name: Relentless (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: If Bullybird would take 14 damage or less that would reduce him to 0 hit points, he is reduced to 1 hit point instead.

trait.name: Seedspeech
entries: Bullybird can communicate simple ideas to living plants, and is able to interpret their responses in simple language.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Bullybird makes two melee attacks with his battleaxe.

action.name: Battleaxe
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) slashing damage, or 14 ({@damage 2d10 + 3}) slashing damage if used with two hands.

action.name: Heavy Crossbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 4} to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d10 + 2}) piercing damage.

monster.name: Burlywhirl
languages: understands Auran but can't speak it

trait.name: Glide
entries: When falling at least 10 feet, Burlywhirl can spend a reaction to fly up to his speed in one direction as he descends. He lands in an unoccupied space at the end of his movement, and takes no falling damage. Burlywhirl can't glide while carrying heavy objects, or heavy weapons (though he can drop any held items as part of his reaction).

trait.name: Talons
entries: Burlywhirl rolls advantage on Strength ({@skill Athletics}) checks made to climb any surface his talons could reasonably grip.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Burlywhirl makes two melee attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) slashing damage or 8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) slashing damage if used with two hands.

action.name: Talons
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, Burlywhirl can spend a bonus action to {@action grapple} them (Escape {@dc 13}) if the attack hits.

action.name: Heavy Crossbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 2} to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d10}) piercing damage.

action.name: Leadership (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: For 1 minute, Burlywhirl can utter a special command or warning whenever a nonhostile creature that it can see within 30 feet of it makes an attack roll or a saving throw. The creature can add a {@dice d4} to its roll provided it can hear and understand Burlywhirl. A creature can benefit from only one Leadership die at a time. This effect ends if Burlywhirl is {@condition incapacitated}.

trait.name: Resilience
entries: Cackle has advantage on saving throws against being {@condition poisoned}.

trait.name: Skulker
entries: Cackle has advantage on {@skill Stealth} checks made in dim light or total darkness.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Cackle makes two attacks with his longsword or two attacks with his shortbow.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) slashing damage, or 8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) slashing damage if used with two hands.

action.name: Shortbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 4} to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) piercing damage.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: Cackle adds 2 to his AC against one melee attack that would hit him. To do so, Cackle must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.

monster.name: Cadwyll Piper
languages: understands Auran but can't speak it

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Cadwyll is a 3rd-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 13}, {@hit 5} to hit with spell attacks). Cadwyll has the following spells prepared:

trait.name: Special Equipment
entries: Cadwyll wields a magical longbow. It is a {@item Red-Feather Longbow|HumblewoodCampaignSetting|red-feather bow}{@cite New Humblewood Content|HumblewoodTales|*}.

trait.name: Glide
entries: When falling at least 10 feet, Cadwyll can spend a reaction to fly up to his speed in one direction as he descends. He lands in an unoccupied space at the end of his movement, and takes no falling damage. Cadwyll can't glide while carrying heavy objects, heavy weapons, or shields (though he can drop any held items as part of his reaction).

trait.name: Talons
entries: Cadwyll rolls advantage on Strength ({@skill Athletics}) checks made to climb any surface his talons could reasonably grip.

trait.name: Aerial Defense
entries: Creatures who attack Cadwyll while he is falling, gliding, or jumping have disadvantage on their attack roll.

trait.name: Hunter (3/Day)
entries: As a bonus action, Cadwyll can deal an extra {@damage 1d10} damage on his next attack made with a shortbow or longbow.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Cadwyll makes two melee attacks or two ranged attacks.

action.name: Red-Feather Bow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 6} to hit, 150/600 feet, one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) piercing damage.

action.name: Scimitar
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Talons
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The caterpede can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 2} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d10}) piercing damage.

variant.name: Toxic Caterpedes
entries: A handful of wild caterpedes can be found in the Wood, and some are toxic. Their meat can be rendered edible through a {@spell purify food and drink} spell or similar effect, or through careful draining of its internal fluids, requiring 24 hours of preparation and a successful {@dc 15} Wisdom ({@skill Survival}) check to remove its toxins. Toxic caterpedes use the same statistics listed for a caterpede, but with the following additions:

items.name: Damage Immunities
items.entry: The caterpede is immune to poison damage instead of resistant to it.

items.name: Condition Immunities
items.entry: The caterpede is immune to the {@condition poisoned} condition.

entries: The toxic caterpede also has the following trait:

items.name: Bitter Taste
items.entry: If the caterpede takes damage from a bite attack, the attacker takes 7 ({@dice 2d6}) points of poison damage and must succeed on a {@dc 13} Constitution saving throw or become {@condition poisoned} for 1 minute.

items.name: Bitter Taste
entries: If the caterpede takes damage from a bite attack, the attacker takes 7 ({@dice 2d6}) points of poison damage and must succeed on a {@dc 13} Constitution saving throw or become {@condition poisoned} for 1 minute.

trait.name: Scowl (2/Day)
entries: As a bonus action, Cathus can attempt to intimidate a creature within 30 feet of him who can see him. The creature must succeed on a Wisdom ({@skill Insight}) check opposed by Cathus's Charisma ({@skill Intimidation}) check or become {@condition frightened} of Cathus for up to 1 minute. The target can attempt a new opposed check at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.

trait.name: Resilience
entries: Cathus has advantage on saving throws against being {@condition poisoned}.

trait.name: Skulker
entries: Cathus has advantage on {@skill Stealth} checks made in dim light or total darkness.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Cathus makes two melee attacks with his barbed shortsword and one with his dagger. Or Cathus can make two ranged attacks with his daggers.

action.name: Barbed Shortsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) piercing damage. When Cathus scores a critical hit with this weapon, his attack deals an extra 7 piercing damage.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) piercing damage.

monster.name: Christophe Laszlo
languages: understands Auran but can't speak it

trait.name: Glide
entries: When falling at least 10 feet, Christophe can spend a reaction to fly up to his speed in one direction as he descends. Christophe lands in an unoccupied space at the end of his movement and takes no falling damage. Christophe cannot glide while carrying heavy objects, heavy weapons, or shields (though he can drop any held items as part of his reaction).

trait.name: Wing Flap
entries: As a bonus action, Christophe can use his powerful feathered arms to propel himself 15 feet upward. Christophe can't use this ability while gliding.

trait.name: Seedspeech
entries: Christophe can communicate simple ideas to living plants, and is able to interpret their responses in simple language.

trait.name: Teamaster
entries: Christophe has advantage on Intelligence ({@skill Nature}) checks related to plants that can be used as cooking herbs or to make teas.

action.name: Fisticuffs
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 2} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}2 ({@damage 1d4}) bludgeoning damage.

monster.name: Connie
languages: understands Auran but can't speak it

trait.name: Glide
entries: When falling at least 10 feet, Connie can spend a reaction to fly up to her speed in one direction as she descends. She lands in an unoccupied space at the end of her movement and takes no falling damage. She cannot glide while carrying heavy objects or heavy weapons (though she can drop any held items as part of her reaction).

trait.name: Talons
entries: Connie has advantage on Strength ({@skill Athletics}) checks made to climb any surface her talons could reasonably grip.

trait.name: Patient
entries: When Connie reacts with a {@action Ready||readied action}, she has advantage on the first attack roll, skill check, or ability check she makes as part of that action.

trait.name: Woodland Hunter
entries: Connie treats three-quarters cover as half cover and half cover as no cover.

action.name: Shortened Spear
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d4 + 1}) piercing damage, or 4 ({@damage 1d6 + 1}) piercing damage if used with two hands.

trait.name: Kren's Gifts
entries: The Rosselbuck has advantage on all Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) and Wisdom ({@skill Survival}) checks. The Rosselbuck can also make a bite attack as a bonus action on each of its turns.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The Rosselbuck has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: The Rosselbuck's weapon attacks are magical.

trait.name: Predatory Aura
entries: Any creature that ends its turn within 10 feet of the Rosselbuck must succeed on a {@dc 13} Wisdom saving throw or take 4 ({@damage 1d8}) necrotic damage.

trait.name: Loping Glide
entries: When falling or long jumping at least 30 feet, the Rosselbuck can spend a reaction to fly up to twice its speed in one direction as it descends. The Rosselbuck lands in an unoccupied space at the end of its movement and takes no falling damage.

trait.name: Standing Leap
entries: The Rosselbuck's long jump is up to 60 feet and its high jump is up to 40 feet, with or without a running start.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Rosselbuck makes one antler attack and one kick attack.

action.name: Antler
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) piercing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) necrotic damage.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) piercing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) necrotic damage.

action.name: Kick
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d12 + 4}) bludgeoning damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) necrotic damage.

action.name: Deadly Leap
entries: If the Rosselbuck jumps or glides at least 30 feet as part of its movement, it can then use this action to land on its feet in a space occupied by one or more other creatures. Each of these creatures must succeed on a {@dc 17} Dexterity saving throw or be knocked {@condition prone} and take 26 ({@damage 6d6 + 5}) bludgeoning damage and 2 ({@damage 1d4}) necrotic damage. On a successful save, the creature takes only half the damage, isn't knocked {@condition prone}, and is pushed 5 feet out of the Rosselbuck's space into an adjacent unoccupied space of the creature's choice. If no unoccupied space is within range, the creature instead falls {@condition prone} in the Rosselbuck's space.

legendary.name: Kick
entries: The Rosselbuck makes a kick attack.

legendary.name: Howl of the Predator (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The Rosselbuck releases an unnatural, terrifying howl. Each creature within 30 feet of the Rosselbuck that can hear the howl must succeed on a {@dc 13} Wisdom saving throw or be {@condition frightened} for 1 minute. Creatures who fail the saving throw are also {@condition restrained} until the end of the Rosselbuck's next turn. A {@condition frightened} creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

monster.name: Corvum Songweaver
languages: understands Auran but can't speak it

trait.name: Glide
entries: When falling at least 10 feet, the songweaver can spend a reaction to fly up to its speed in one direction as it descends. It lands in an unoccupied space at the end of its movement, and takes no falling damage. The songweaver can't glide while carrying heavy objects, heavy weapons, or shields (though it can drop any held items as part of its reaction).

trait.name: Talons
entries: The songweaver has advantage on Strength ({@skill Athletics}) checks to climb any surface its talons could reasonably grip.

trait.name: Skulker
entries: The songweaver has advantage on {@skill Stealth} checks made in dim light or total darkness.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The songweaver can Sing. It then makes two attacks.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Talons
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Sing {@recharge 5}
entries: The songweaver sings a song infused with magic. Each song targets any number of creatures within 30 feet of the songweaver. A creature must be able to hear the songweaver sing in order to be affected by its song. Each time the songweaver takes this action, it can choose from one of the following effects:

items.name: Dirge of Sorrow
entries: All targeted creatures must make a {@dc 13} Charisma saving throw or have disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws made before the start of the songweaver's next turn.

items.name: Hero's Ballad
entries: All targeted creatures gain 4 ({@dice 1d4 + 2}) temporary hit points and advantage on attack rolls made before the start of the songweaver's next turn.

items.name: Traveler's Tune
entries: All targeted creatures can spend their reactions to move up to their speed. This movement does not provoke {@action opportunity attack||opportunity attacks}.

trait.name: Bitter Taste
entries: If the cosmoth takes damage from a bite attack, the attacker takes 7 {@dice 2d6} points of poison damage and must succeed on a {@dc 13} Constitution saving throw or become {@condition poisoned} for 1 minute.

trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: The cosmoth has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on smell.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}17 ({@damage 6d4 + 2}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Amorphous
entries: The cursed slime can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

trait.name: Cursed
entries: Any creature that touches the slime or hits it with a melee attack must succeed on a {@dc 12} Wisdom saving throw or take 2 ({@damage 1d4}) psychic damage.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The slime can climb difficult surfaces, including vertically and upside down, without making an ability check.

action.name: Pseudopod

entries: When falling at least 10 feet, Lucky can spend a reaction to fly up to his speed in one direction as he descends. Lucky can't glide while carrying heavy objects, heavy weapons, or shields (though he can drop any held items as part of his reaction).

entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) piercing damage, and the target must make a constitution saving throw, taking 24 ({@damage 7d6}) poison damage on a failure, or half as much damage on a successful one.

entries: Moonflower can use a bonus action on her turn to target one creature within 30 feet of her. entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) piercing damage.

action.name: Curl Up

Any creature that misses Moonflower with a melee attack while she is curled up takes {@dice 2d4} points of piercing damage from her sharp quills. If a creature hits the bard while she is curled up, however, Moonflower is knocked {@condition prone} in her space at the end of the turn. Moonflower may uncurl themselves at any point during her turn.

On a successful save, the creature takes only half the damage, isn't knocked {@condition prone}, and is pushed 5 feet out of the Rosselbuck's space into an adjacent unoccupied space of its choice. If no unoccupied space is within range, the creature instead falls {@condition prone} in the Rosselbuck's space.

action.name: Beast Command
entries: Skopps commands a beast or monstrosity within 80 feet of him that can hear him. The target must succeed on a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw or be {@condition frightened} of Skopps until the end of his next turn. While the target is {@condition frightened} and Skopps is conscious, Skopps has a telepathic link with it, and can use this link to mentally control the creature. At the start of the controlled creature's turn, Skopps can decide what actions and movement the creature takes on its turn. The target takes only the actions Skopps commands, and doesn't do anything that Skopps doesn't allow it to do. Skopps can cause the creature to use a reaction at any time, but this requires Skopps to use his reaction as well. Each time the controlled creature takes damage, it makes a Wisdom saving throw against being {@condition frightened}. If the saving throw succeeds, this effect ends. Beast Command is a magical effect.

trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: The slicar has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on smell.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d10 + 2}) piercing damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) poison damage. The target must succeed on a {@dc 12} Constitution saving throw or become {@condition poisoned} for 1 hour.

spellcasting.name: Cute
headerEntries: The slime is adorable. It can cast {@spell charm person} once per day without material components.

trait.name: Adorable Monstrosity
entries: The slime has advantage on Charisma ({@skill Performance}) and Charisma ({@skill Persuasion}) checks.

trait.name: Amorphous
entries: The slime can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

trait.name: Mucus
entries: When the slime is hit by a melee attack, the attacker must succeed on a {@dc 12} Strength saving throw or their weapon becomes stuck in the slime. The weapon can be wrenched out by using an action to make a {@dc 12} Strength ({@skill Athletics}) check, freeing the weapon on a success. All weapons stuck in the slime can be retrieved once the slime is slain.

action.name: Pseudopod
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d4 + 1}) bludgeoning damage.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Slime King's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 16}). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

trait.name: Multiple Heads
entries: The Slime King has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks and on saving throws against being {@condition blinded}, {@condition charmed}, {@condition deafened}, {@condition frightened}, {@condition stunned}, and knocked {@condition unconscious}.

trait.name: Wakeful
entries: While the Slime King sleeps, at least one of its heads is awake.

trait.name: Wallow in Waste
entries: The Slime King is immune to the effects of noxious gasses, such as those caused by the {@spell stinking cloud} and {@spell cloudkill} spells.

trait.name: Watchful Skulls
entries: The Slime King has two extra reactions that can be used only for {@action opportunity attack||opportunity attacks}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Slime King makes three Bite attacks. It can replace one of its Bite attacks with a Slimeforged Blade attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d10 + 5}) piercing damage.

action.name: Slimeforged Blade
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d6 + 7}) slashing damage. If the Slime King attacks a creature and rolls a 20 on its attack roll, the target is {@condition paralyzed} until the end of its next turn.

legendary.name: Bite
entries: The Slime King makes a Bite attack.

legendary.name: Slimecasting
entries: The Slime King casts {@spell acid splash} or {@spell web}.

legendary.name: Spread the Curse (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: The Slime King sends out a spray of bone and slime. All enemies in a 10-foot radius centered on the Slime King must make a {@dc 14} Dexterity saving throw, taking 3 ({@damage 1d6}) piercing damage and 3 ({@damage 1d6}) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The slime king can then cast {@spell bestow curse} on any creature that failed its saving throw.

trait.name: Antimagic Susceptibility
entries: The slimesworn cultist is {@condition incapacitated} while in the area of an {@spell antimagic field}. If targeted by {@spell dispel magic}, the slimesworn cultist must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against the caster's spell save DC or fall {@condition unconscious} for 1 minute.

trait.name: Dead Accurate
entries: If the slimesworn cultist is motionless, it looks merely like a dead mage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The slimesworn cultist makes two melee attacks.

action.name: Fabric Tendrils
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 10 ft., one Medium or smaller creature. {@h}The creature is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 12}). Until this grapple ends, the target is also {@condition restrained} and must succeed on a {@dc 12} Constitution saving throw at the start of each its turns or take 10 ({@damage 3d6}) acid damage.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) bludgeoning damage.

monster.name: Slip Tideswell
languages: understands Auran but can't speak it

trait.name: Glide
entries: When falling at least 10 feet, Slip can spend a reaction to fly up to his speed in one direction as he descends. He lands in an unoccupied space at the end of his movement, and takes no falling damage. Slip can't glide while carrying heavy objects, heavy weapons, or shields (though he can drop any held items as part of his reaction).

trait.name: Drop Attack
entries: Slip can make an attack during his glide. If he does so, he deals an extra {@dice 1d8} points of damage.

trait.name: Patient
entries: When Slip takes a {@action Ready||readied action}, he has advantage on the first attack roll, skill check, or ability check he makes as a part of that action.

trait.name: Talons
entries: Slip has advantage on Strength ({@skill Athletics}) checks to climb any surface his talons could reasonably grip.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) piercing damage.

action.name: Talons

reaction.name: Riposte
entries: Slip reduces the damage dealt by one melee attack that would hit him by {@dice 1d8}, and deals that much piercing damage to his attacker. Slip must see the attacker and be wielding a rapier.

reaction.name: Parry

trait.name: Cunning Action

trait.name: Lone Duelist

trait.name: Sneak Attack

trait.name: Standing Leap
entries: Snapshadow's long jump is 40 feet, and her base high jump is 20 feet, with or without a running start.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Snapshadow makes three attacks: two with her cane rapier and one with her dagger.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) piercing damage.

reaction.name: Riposte
entries: Snapshadow reduces the damage dealt by one melee attack that would hit her by {@dice 1d8}, and deals that much piercing damage to her attacker. Snapshadow must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.

trait.name: Cunning Action

trait.name: Forest Cunning
entries: Speck has advantage on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks made in forests and jungle environments.

trait.name: Purifying Skin
entries: Speck has advantage on saving throws made to resist being {@condition poisoned} or infected with a disease.

trait.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
entries: Spleck deals an extra 7 {@damage 2d6} damage when he hits a target with a weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of Spleck that isn't incapacitated and Spleck doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

trait.name: Sticky Grip
entries: Spleck can climb upside down or on difficult surfaces without making ability checks.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Spleck makes two melee attacks with his dagger.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) piercing damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) poison damage.

action.name: Sticky Tongue
entries: Spleck extends his long sticky tongue toward an object he can see within 20 feet of him. His sticky tongue grabs the object and pulls it to him in a straight line. If Spleck has free hands, he can immediately wield the object; otherwise, it drops at his feet. If the object is being held or carried by a creature, Spleck and that creature make opposed Strength ({@skill Athletics}) checks. If the creature wins, it maintains its hold on the object. Alternatively, if Spleck targets an object that is heavier than himself, he is instead pulled toward the object, provoking {@action opportunity attack||opportunity attacks} as normal.

reaction.name: Poison Skin (Recharges on a Short or Long Rest)
entries: When a creature touches Spleck, hits him with a melee weapon attack using natural weapons, or {@action grapple||grapples} him, Spleck can cause that creature to make a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the target takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) poison damage and becomes {@condition poisoned} until the end of Spleck's next turn. On a success, the target takes half as much damage and isn't {@condition poisoned}.

trait.name: Swarm

entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 0 ft., one target in the swarm's space. {@h}5 ({@damage 2d4}) piercing damage, or 2 ({@damage 1d4}) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer. The target must make a {@dc 10} Constitution saving throw or take 10 ({@damage 4d4}) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, the target is stable, but remains {@condition unconscious}, even after regaining hit points. An {@condition unconscious} creature can be woken by taking an action to shake it awake, otherwise the creature will awaken in 8 hours.

trait.name: Keen Hearing and Sight

trait.name: Resilience

trait.name: Swarm
entries: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny squirrel. The swarm can't regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 0 ft., one target in the swarm's space. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d6}) piercing damage, or 3 ({@damage 1d6}) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer.

entries: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny insect. The swarm can't regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.

action.name: Bite

variant.name: Gimlet Larvae
entries: Swarms of gimlet larvae are just as damaging to the tree as the beetle themselves. They use the same statistics listed for a swarm of gimlets, but with the characteristics described here.

entries.name: Swarm of Gimlet Larvae

items.name: Speed

items.name: Acidic Mucus
items.entry: {@atk mw} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 0 ft., all targets in the swarm's space. {@h}5 ({@damage 2d4}) acid damage, or 2 ({@damage 1d4}) acid damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer.

action.name: Acidic Mucus

trait.name: Aerial Ace
entries: As long as she's flying, attacks against Tempa are made with disadvantage.

trait.name: Borrowed Flight (Recharges on a Long Rest)

trait.name: Daring Action

trait.name: Standing Leap

action.name: Slingshot
